article.title: Supercharge Your Coding with AI: Discover Orca, the Ultimate Dev Companion!
article.body_markdown:
---
title: Supercharge Your Coding with AI: Discover Orca, the Ultimate Dev Companion!
published: True
tags: ai, development, code, productivity
---

## Quick Summary: 📝
Orca is an AI-powered IDE designed for orchestrating multiple parallel coding agents. It allows users to run various AI models like Codex and ClaudeCode simultaneously, manage their outputs in separate worktrees, and monitor progress via a mobile companion app.

## Key Takeaways: 💡

* ✅ Orchestrates multiple AI code agents (Codex, ClaudeCode, etc.) in a single, unified interface.

* ✅ Parallel Git worktrees enable side-by-side comparison and merging of AI-generated solutions.

* ✅ Mobile companion app allows remote monitoring and steering of AI agents from anywhere.

* ✅ Integrated advanced terminals and a unique "Design Mode" enhance overall developer workflow and UI generation.

* ✅ Boosts developer productivity by enabling rapid experimentation and streamlined AI-assisted development.


## Project Statistics: 📊
* ⭐ **Stars:** 12580
* 🍴 **Forks:** 853
* ❗ **Open Issues:** 425


## Tech Stack: 💻
- ✅ TypeScript


Imagine a world where you could give a coding problem to not just one, but several cutting-edge AI assistants simultaneously, then pick the absolute best solution. Sounds like a superpower, right? Well, get ready, because that's exactly what Orca brings to the table. This incredible project is an AI Orchestrator designed to turn you into a "100x builder" by letting you run and manage multiple AI code models like Codex, ClaudeCode, OpenCode, or Pi, all from a single, unified interface. It's about making AI-assisted development smarter, faster, and incredibly more efficient. One of Orca's standout features is its concept of "Parallel Worktrees." Think of it like this: you have a coding challenge. Instead of feeding it to one AI, waiting for its output, and then maybe trying another, Orca lets you fan out that single prompt across several AI agents. Each agent gets its own isolated Git worktree – a clean slate where it can experiment and generate its solution without interfering with others. This means you can get five different approaches to your problem almost instantly. You can then compare these solutions side-by-side, evaluate their quality, and effortlessly merge the winning code back into your main project. This massively accelerates experimentation and helps you arrive at optimal solutions much quicker than ever before. Your development workflow isn't always confined to your desk, and Orca understands that. With its fantastic Mobile Companion app, you can keep an eye on your AI agents no matter where you are. Get instant notifications when an agent finishes a task, allowing you to stay updated on progress. Even better, you can send follow-up instructions or new prompts directly from your phone. This means true flexibility and continuous oversight, ensuring your AI assistants are always working productively, even when you're on the go. Beyond AI orchestration, Orca also provides a robust and highly capable development environment. It includes Ghostty-class terminals that boast WebGL rendering for incredibly smooth performance. You can create infinite splits to manage multiple tasks concurrently and enjoy a scrollback history that magically survives restarts. This means a powerful, integrated terminal experience that complements your AI-driven workflow, making your day-to-day coding tasks more efficient and enjoyable. For front-end developers, Orca's "Design Mode" is a game-changer. Imagine being able to click directly on any UI element within a real Chromium browser window. Orca will then capture its HTML, CSS, and even a cropped screenshot, sending all this context straight into your AI agent's prompt. This eliminates the tedious process of manually describing UI elements to an AI. It empowers your AI to understand and modify visual components with unprecedented accuracy and speed, dramatically accelerating the design and implementation phases of your web projects. Ultimately, Orca is designed to elevate your productivity and expand what's possible with AI in development. By centralizing the management of multiple AI models, facilitating parallel experimentation, offering remote control, and integrating powerful developer tools, it provides a comprehensive platform for modern coding. It helps you explore more solutions, iterate faster, and build better software with the combined intelligence of various AI assistants, truly empowering you to become that "100x builder" you've always aimed to be.

## Learn More: 🔗
[View the Project on GitHub](https://github.com/stablyai/orca)

article.description: Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.
